name: @aliran/reseller
description: Aliran reseller panel — role-hierarchy + credit-ledger front for the panel admin API: third parties activate and manage viewer accounts without holding real admin power
comment: Deliberately a pure HTTP service: no corestore/hyperswarm — every account mutation is a call to the panel admin API (PANEL_ADMIN_URL), which may live on another machine. The reseller panel owns what the panel does not: the role hierarchy, the credit ledger, and the subscription clock (the panel has no account expiry).
